objective: Add missing root-level local enforcement hooks for governance checks, backlog alignment, and fail-fast/error-pattern schema validation.
scope_boundary: Add `hooks/governance-check.sh`, `hooks/backlog-check.sh`, and `hooks/check-errors.sh` at the repository root.
Make each hook executable and smoke-testable from both the repo root and nested directories.
Reuse existing governance validators and schema contracts where available.
Add issue-backed PDCAR, execution-scope, validation, and closeout artifacts.
out_of_scope: Changing reusable GitHub Actions workflow policy.
Changing fail-fast schema policy beyond exposing the existing minimal checks locally.
research_summary: Issue #186 identifies that root-level `hooks/governance-check.sh`, `hooks/backlog-check.sh`, and `hooks/check-errors.sh` are missing even though repo docs list them as required local hooks. Existing root hooks use portable bash entrypoints, and existing CI/workflow logic already owns the actual governance, backlog, and fail-fast schema contracts. The minimal implementation is to add tracked root scripts that resolve the checkout root and invoke those existing checks.

sprints.name: Root Hook Entry Points
sprints.goal: Provide tracked local hook scripts for the missing required hook names.
tasks: Set executable mode on all three scripts.
acceptance_criteria: All three files exist under root `hooks/`.
All three scripts pass shell syntax checks.

sprints.name: Local Enforcement Wiring
sprints.goal: Reuse existing repository governance logic through the new hook names.
tasks: Wire `governance-check.sh` to structured-plan checks, governance-surface changed-file validation, backlog alignment, and `git diff --check`.
Wire `check-errors.sh` to FAIL_FAST_LOG and ERROR_PATTERNS schema checks matching the reusable workflow contract.
Smoke-test each hook from the repo root and from `docs/plans`.
acceptance_criteria: Hook output is explicit and exits non-zero on validation failures.

sprints.name: Governance Evidence
sprints.goal: Record the issue-backed implementation and final e2e proof.
tasks: Add implementation execution-scope and same-family exception evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Execution-scope assertion passes for the changed-file set.

specialist_reviews.focus: Map the missing local hook names to existing governance enforcement logic.
specialist_reviews.summary: The new hooks should stay thin and invoke existing repo-owned validators or workflow-equivalent schema checks.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is an implementation slice exposing existing local hook entrypoints, not an architecture or standards change requiring Tier 1 alternate-family review. A read-only implementation review is planned before PR closeout.
evidence: STANDARDS.md Society of Minds cross-review scope

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement issue #186 only: add the three root-level hooks, record governance evidence, validate root/nested smoke behavior, and update trackers.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run hook smoke tests, local gates, read-only review, then open a PR.

material_deviation_rules: If reusable workflow policy must change, create a separate issue.
If fail-fast schema policy must broaden, create a separate issue.
If backlog validation behavior must change, create a separate issue.
If downstream repos need changes, create a separate issue-backed rollout slice.
